context: Tests whether the agent notices that the existing _journal.json uses synthetic future-dated timestamps (1774560400000+N, which is ~2026-03-26) and that a new entry must continue the monotonic sequence. If the agent uses Date.now() or any real timestamp, the new entry will have a `when` value BEFORE the existing entries, breaking Drizzle's migration ordering. The correct approach is to use 1774560400011 (one increment after the last entry).

checklist.name: Uses monotonic timestamp continuing the sequence
checklist.description: The new journal entry's `when` value is 1774560400011 or any value strictly greater than 1774560400010 (the last existing entry) AND follows the same incrementing pattern

checklist.name: Identifies the synthetic timestamp convention
checklist.description: The notes mention that the existing timestamps are not real wall-clock times, or that they use a synthetic monotonic sequence, or warns about timestamp ordering

checklist.name: Correct migration SQL
checklist.description: The SQL adds a nullable timestamp with timezone column named verified_at to diary_entries using ALTER TABLE ADD COLUMN

checklist.name: Correct schema change
checklist.description: The schema.ts adds a verified_at column as a nullable timestamp with timezone on the diaryEntries table
